name: Atlas Iron Limited
description: Atlas Iron Limited is an Australian iron ore mining and exploration company operating in the Pilbara region of Western Australia. Founded in 2004, the company specializes in the exploration, development, and mining of iron ore deposits. It operates several mines, including Mt Webber and Sanjiv Ridge, and utilizes established road and port infrastructure to export its products to global markets. In 2018, Atlas Iron became a wholly-owned subsidiary of Hancock Prospecting Pty Ltd.
